hotels.description_en:
Historic Setting: Hotel Museo Cayara in Potosi is housed in a historic building, offering a unique atmosphere. Guests enjoy a sun terrace, lush garden, and outdoor fireplace.
Comfortable Accommodations: Rooms feature private bathrooms, balconies with garden or mountain views, and soundproofing. Additional amenities include free WiFi, hypoallergenic bedding, and parquet floors.
Dining Experience: The family-friendly restaurant serves local specialities, vegetarian, vegan, and gluten-free options. Breakfast includes American and buffet styles with juice, cheese, and fruits.
Convenient Services: The hotel provides free on-site private parking, paid shuttle service, concierge, tour desk, and luggage storage. Guests can also enjoy outdoor seating and picnic areas.
